name: Bolide cloth handbag
description:
Hermès Bolide fabric pouch. Navy blue color. Clean canvas exterior and interior. The interior has four patch pockets, two on each side. The black Hermès label is still attached to the interior. The leather tab on the zipper pull is missing. Based on the zipper pull, this piece dates from the early 90s. Light marks on the exterior. The lambskin piping is in good condition. This is the largest size of the Bolide case. It can be transformed into a handbag by attaching a shoulder strap to the loops on the sides. I also offer the mini size. 
Retail price $580 new in store
Feel free to ask questions or send offers.



Navy, navy blue, leather clutch, designer accessory, lambskin trim, vintage look, casual chic, compact bag, everyday carry, minimalist, luxury style
